gitCommit.subject: refactor: use customer-ksi0mrlcw6rwzezz subdomain instead of legacy videodelivery.net (BUG #6)
gitCommit.body:
refactor: use customer-ksi0mrlcw6rwzezz subdomain instead of legacy videodelivery.net (BUG #6)

FASE 6: Standardizes the Cloudflare Stream subdomain across the codebase.
Previously cloudflare-stream.ts generated videodelivery.net URLs (legacy domain),
while the DB and VPS importer use customer-ksi0mrlcw6rwzezz.cloudflarestream.com.
Introduces a single CF_STREAM_SUBDOMAIN constant (DRY) used by thumbnail, HLS and MP4 helpers.
The iframe embed helper uses iframe.cloudflarestream.com (the embed-specific host).
